stemHtml: An MEL item is found before start-up. Due to possible performance changes, the flight crew wants to correctly consider this when initialising the FMS. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: FMS only accounts for fuel related items.
options.b: They can insert the MEL item and the FMS will automatically account for it.
options.c: They can only choose the aircraft type and model.
options.d: The FMS doesn’t take into account the MEL items.
